Appearances:
Plaintiff Guru Sharanam LLC dba Sunnyside Hotel is present. Represented by Amin.
Attorney Kevin Sullivan appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Marc Culbertson is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JAN-09-2012 is vacated.
